dialogue.speaker: JACK
dialogue.line: "We can't keep her here for much longer, Rachel. The KGB will find her."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JACK, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: "We'll get her out, Jack. We always do."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, his eyes darting between the documents on the table, a hint of frustration on his face.

dialogue.speaker: JACK
dialogue.line: "Easy for you to say, Rachel. You're not the one who has to deal with the KGB on a daily basis."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, a resolute look on her face, her eyes shining with determination.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: "That's not the point, Jack. The point is we have a chance to defect a high-ranking Soviet official. We can't let it slip through our fingers."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of JACK, his shoulders tensed, his jaw clenched in anger.

dialogue.speaker: VLADIMIR
dialogue.line: "I don't know if I can trust you. I've been warned about the CIA's tactics."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of VLADIMIR, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: JACK
dialogue.line: "Vladimir, we're here to help you. We'll get you out of Berlin and set you up with a new identity."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of VLADIMIR, his eyes darting between JACK and RACHEL, a look of vulnerability on his face.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: "But first, you have to tell us what you know. About the Soviet Union's plans for Eastern Europe."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, a reassuring smile on his face, his eyes locked on VLADIMIR.

dialogue.speaker: VLADIMIR
dialogue.line: "I'll tell you everything. But you have to promise me one thing."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, her eyes locked on VLADIMIR, a hint of steel in her voice.

dialogue.speaker: ALEXANDRA
dialogue.line: "Jack, we have a problem. One of our own team members has been compromised. The KGB has a mole within the CIA."
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of ALEXANDRA, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: JACK
dialogue.line: "What are you talking about? Who is it?"
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of ALEXANDRA, her eyes locked on JACK, a look of concern etched on her face.

dialogue.speaker: ALEXANDRA
dialogue.line: "I'm not sure yet. But I think it's someone close to you, Jack."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, his eyes narrowed, a hint of anger on his face.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.visual_cue: Medium shot of RACHEL, expression intense and focused.

dialogue.speaker: JACK
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, a look of happiness on her face, her eyes sparkling with delight.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: "It's my husband. He's on his way to the safehouse."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, a look of concern on his face, his eyes locked on RACHEL.

dialogue.speaker: JACK
dialogue.line: "Rachel, I don't think that's a good idea."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, a look of excitement on her face, her eyes shining with anticipation.

dialogue.speaker: RACHEL
dialogue.line: "Why not, Jack? He's my husband. I trust him."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of JACK, a look of warning on his face, his eyes locked on RACHEL.

dialogue.speaker: JACK
dialogue.line: "Because, Rachel, we don't know who we can trust anymore."
dialogue.visual_cue: Close-up of RACHEL, a look of determination on her face, her eyes locked on JACK.
